codeReview.summary: The feature was successfully implemented. Both `generate_response_node` functions in `agents/graph/nodes.py` and `super_agents/graph/nodes.py` now use `astream_chat_completion_with_thinking()` for streaming inference. The implementation correctly emits `thinking_token` events for each thinking token, emits `thinking_end` with a summary of the first 120 characters of thinking content, and handles LM Studio errors gracefully without crashing. Comprehensive unit tests were added in `test_thinking_events.py` covering all specified validations.

summary: Feature backend-emit-thinking-tokens passes review. All VAL-BE assertions (008, 009, 010) are correctly implemented. The code follows established patterns, emits proper event schemas, and includes comprehensive test coverage. No shared state gaps identified.
